---
name: ByteBites Design Agent
description: A focused agent for generating and refining ByteBites UML diagrams and scaffolds.
argument-hint: The inputs this agent expects, e.g., "a task to implement" or "a question to answer".
tools: ["read", "edit"]
---
Please generate a UML class diagram based on the ByteBites specifications. Focus on the core classes and their relationships, ensuring that all key attributes and methods are included. After generating the initial diagram, review it for completeness and accuracy, making any necessary edits to refine the design. The set of classes should include Restaurant, Customers, Food Categories, Food Items, and Orders, with appropriate relationships and attributes as outlined in the specifications.
